response.justification: Bogdan has extensive C++ experience on Windows (LabWindows/CVI) and strong domain knowledge in investment practices (RIDE Capital), but lacks direct Fixed Income or Fixed Income Derivatives experience. His recent work is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with no recent SQL Server/Oracle exposure or capital markets systems development. Domain expertise substitution is possible but not ideal.
strengths: Proven C++ development experience on Windows (National Instruments role)
Strong investment banking domain knowledge (RIDE Capital)
Excellent communication skills (workshops, talks, and open-source contributions)
concerns: Lacks recent C++ experience (recent roles focused on TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang)
No clear SQL Server/Oracle experience in recent roles
Limited Fixed Income/Fixed Income Derivatives exposure

key_factors.factor: Fixed Income/Fixed Income Derivatives domain expertise
Recent relevance of technical stack (SQL, C++)
